title: cyanus acmophyllus
intro: Cyanus acmophyllus, also known as Cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion. The health benefits of Cornflower include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and supporting digestive health. Cornflower can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
